$comment: Paloma365 product catalog. Managed by the product team; the LLM only reads it. Impact numbers are conservative, sales-approved uplift assumptions consumed by ROIEngine (which additionally applies gross margin, attribution and ramp-up).

modules.name: Paloma365 Delivery
modules.description: Own-delivery management: courier dispatch, zones, live tracking and aggregator integrations.
features: Courier dispatch board with live GPS tracking
limitations: Requires at least one dedicated courier on staff
Aggregator commissions are not included in module pricing

modules.name: Paloma365 CRM & Loyalty
modules.description: Guest profiles, segmentation, cashback/bonus programs and campaign messaging.
features: Unified guest profiles with visit history
limitations: SMS campaign delivery is billed separately by the telecom provider

modules.name: Paloma365 Kitchen Display
modules.description: Digital kitchen screens with ticket routing, station timers and cook-time analytics.
features: Per-station ticket routing and bump bars
Preparation time targets with overdue alerts
Cook-time analytics by dish and daypart
limitations: Requires a wall-mounted display per kitchen station

modules.name: Paloma365 QR Menu
modules.description: Contactless table ordering with photo menus, modifiers and built-in upsell prompts.
features: Photo-rich digital menu with instant updates
limitations: Effect depends on menu photo quality provided by the restaurant

modules.name: Paloma365 Inventory
modules.description: Stock control, recipe costing, supplier orders and write-off tracking.
features: Real-time stock levels with low-stock alerts
limitations: Requires initial stock-take and recipe data entry

modules.name: Paloma365 Analytics Pro
modules.description: Advanced dashboards: sales, labour, menu engineering and multi-location comparison.
limitations: Most valuable for owners of two or more locations
